recapPrompt.prompt: The current sum is too large. Which pointer move is safe?

choices.label: Move the right pointer left
choices.feedback: Correct. In sorted order, moving right left makes the total smaller.

choices.label: Move the left pointer right
choices.feedback: Not quite. That would make the total larger, not smaller.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain why the wrong pointer move would hide the answer.

practiceChallenge.title: Mastery check: rebuild the rule
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the move helper without the walkthrough. Passing this marks the mastery lesson complete.
hints: Too small means you need a bigger number.
Too large means you need a smaller number.
A correct full set is left, right, and found.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Pass. You completed the mastery implementation task.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Needs practice. Fix the move rule and run the tests again.

blanks.label: Move when the sum is too small
Move when the sum is too large
Move when the sum matches the target
